landing.description: Bridging people and cultures in Southeast Asia, bank seamlessly with [NextGen].

consent.description: Thank you for downloading Maybank2u ID...
consent.checkbox_label: I agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Notice

biometric_setup.description: Use your fingerprint or face ID for quick authentication.

security_image.description: This image will display when you log in on legitimate Maybank channels.

m2u_create_username.validation_uppercase: Must contain at least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 number and 1 special character
m2u_create_username.validation_first_char: First character must not be a number
m2u_create_username.error_dob: Username must not contain date of birth

m2u_create_password.validation_complexity: Must contain at least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 number and 1 special character
m2u_create_password.validation_no_username: Must not match your Maybank2u username
m2u_create_password.validation_first_char: First character must not be a number
m2u_create_password.error_dob: Passcode must not contain date of birth

change_app_notice.description: Logging in here will log you out of your previous app.
change_app_notice.bullet_1: This will be your sole logged in device.
change_app_notice.bullet_2: You will not be able to log in on your previous app.
change_app_notice.bullet_3: For your convenience, ensure your official mobile number and app are on the same device.

display_name.description: Let us know how you would like to be addressed. The name will also be seen by other [NextGen] app users.
